summary: 2026-06-06 21:33:32 PDT — Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, the camera-overlay-context-shape spec, the background doc, and the SDK type ground truth. The branch implements the requested RealZoom running-context normalization, updates the fake to the SDK `{ context }` shape with routing coverage, and makes `drawParticipant` best-effort while preserving `drawWebView` failure behavior. No spec or diff-grounded issues found. I attempted `npm test`, but the read-only sandbox blocked Vitest temp-file creation with EPERM before tests executed, so the gate was not runnable here.
